sections.description: Typed Prometheus HTTP API client for fetching metrics data.
sections.purpose: Provides typed functions for querying the Prometheus-compatible API endpoints, isolating all HTTP fetch logic and response parsing from the rest of the application.
strengths: Fully typed with TypeScript interfaces for Prometheus responses
Handles {step} template replacement in range queries
getVal helper sums multi-series results safely
weaknesses: No request cancellation (AbortController) for in-flight queries when time range changes
Error messages are generic; could include query text for debugging
sections.test_coverage: No direct tests. Indirectly tested through composable integration.
sections.functionality:
- promQuery(query) — instant query via /api/v1/query, returns PromResult[]
- promRangeQuery(query, start, end, step) — range query via /api/v1/query_range with {step} template substitution, returns PromRangeResult[]
- getVal(result) — sums all values from an instant query result array
sections.files:
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| types.ts | TypeScript interfaces: PromResult (instant query), PromRangeResult (range query), PromResponse<T> (API envelope) |
| prometheus.ts | API client functions: promQuery, promRangeQuery, getVal |
